overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk through a wet residential Los Santos neighborhood during a vibrant orange sunset. The camera navigates through quiet streets, under construction scaffolding, and past parked cars with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet residential intersection with palm trees

events.description: turns right onto sidewalk approaching scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking through wet residential streets, turning corners and observing the sunset-lit surroundings with downtown skyline visible

entered.detail: two-story white apartment building with balconies and external staircases
single-story commercial building with red facade and green signage
tall palm trees lining the street against the orange sunset sky
distant city skyscrapers visible on the horizon
wooden utility poles with power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wet residential intersection during a vibrant orange sunset. The camera walks forward, turning left past a white stucco apartment building and red storefront, then continues toward the downtown skyline visible between palm trees before turning right.

events.description: enters covered scaffolding walkway along building facade

agents.ego_description: walking under metal construction scaffolding on the sidewalk, passing painted murals on the wall

entered.detail: metal pipe scaffolding with wooden planks forming a covered walkway overhead
pink stucco building wall with arched doorways and construction materials
wall with faded painted mural of a figure in yellow dress

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered construction scaffolding walkway running alongside a pink building wall. The space is sheltered from the open sky, with metal poles framing the view of the wet street. A painted mural becomes visible on the wall as the camera progresses.

events.description: exits scaffolding into open street with construction barriers and dumpster

agents.ego_description: navigating around orange construction barriers and a green dumpster on the sidewalk

entered.detail: plastic orange and white striped construction barriers blocking part of the street
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
elevated highway overpass visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the scaffolding, the scene opens back up to the wet street with full sky visibility. The camera walks past orange construction barriers and a green dumpster, with a distant overpass structure becoming visible ahead.

events.description: passes parked black sedan on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a parked car and approaching a distant overpass

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked on the side of the wet street

entered.detail: black four-door sedan parked along the curb
wooden privacy fence painted red running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a quiet residential street with a parked black sedan and red wooden fence lining the sidewalk. The camera walks past the vehicle as the distant overpass grows larger in the frame, with palm trees silhouetted against the orange sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a wet residential neighborhood that transitions from open intersections into a sheltered construction zone and back out into the open street under a vibrant orange sunset. It begins at a damp intersection, moving past a white stucco apartment and red storefront while the downtown skyline remains visible between palm trees. As the camera turns, the scene shifts into a semi-covered construction walkway where metal poles frame the wet street and a painted mural appears on a pink wall. The view then opens back up to the full sky as the camera exits the scaffolding, passing orange barriers and a green dumpster toward a distant overpass. Finally, the movement continues along a quiet sidewalk past a parked black sedan and a red wooden fence, with the overpass growing larger against the silhouetted palm trees.
